# Determining if 22733 is Prime

## Initial Checks

**Is it even?** 22733 ends in 3, so no.
**Divisible by 3?** 2+2+7+3+3 = 17, not divisible by 3.
**Divisible by 5?** Doesn't end in 0 or 5, so no.
**Divisible by 7?** 22733 ÷ 7 = 3247.57... → 7 × 3247 = 22729, remainder 4. No.
**Divisible by 11?** (2+7+3) - (2+3) = 12 - 5 = 7, not divisible by 11. No.
**Divisible by 13?** 13 × 1748 = 22724, remainder 9. No.
**Divisible by 17?** 17 × 1337 = 22729, remainder 4. No.
**Divisible by 19?** 19 × 1196 = 22724, remainder 9. No.
**Divisible by 23?** 23 × 988 = 22724, remainder 9. No.
**Divisible by 29?** 29 × 783 = 22707, remainder 26. No.
**Divisible by 31?** 31 × 733 = 22723, remainder 10. No.
**Divisible by 37?** 37 × 614 = 22718, remainder 15. No.
**Divisible by 41?** 41 × 554 = 22714, remainder 19. No.
**Divisible by 43?** 43 × 528 = 22704, remainder 29. No.
**Divisible by 47?** 47 × 483 = 22701, remainder 32. No.
**Divisible by 53?** 53 × 428 = 22684, remainder 49. No.
**Divisible by 59?** 59 × 385 = 22715, remainder 18. No.
**Divisible by 61?** 61 × 372 = 22692, remainder 41. No.
**Divisible by 67?** 67 × 339 = 22713, remainder 20. No.
**Divisible by 71?** 71 × 320 = 22720, remainder 13. No.
**Divisible by 73?** 73 × 311 = 22703, remainder 30. No.
**Divisible by 79?** 79 × 287 = 22673, remainder 60. No.
**Divisible by 83?** 83 × 273 = 22659, remainder 74. No.
**Divisible by 89?** 89 × 255 = 22695, remainder 38. No.
**Divisible by 97?** 97 × 234 = 22698, remainder 35. No.
**Divisible by 101?** 101 × 225 = 22725, remainder 8. No.
**Divisible by 103?** 103 × 220 = 22660, remainder 73. No.
**Divisible by 107?** 107 × 212 = 22684, remainder 49. No.
**Divisible by 109?** 109 × 208 = 22672, remainder 61. No.
**Divisible by 113?** 113 × 201 = 22713, remainder 20. No.
**Divisible by 127?** 127 × 179 = 22733. Let me check: 127 × 180 = 22860, minus 127 = **22733**. ✓ **Yes!**

## Conclusion

**22733 = 127 × 179**

Since 22733 has factors other than 1 and itself, **22733 is NOT prime**.
